info.title: MaxBounty Affiliate API
info.description: This is the documentation for the MaxBounty Affiliate API for use by MaxBounty affiliates.

post.description: Returns the authorization token required to access protected resources. [EXPIRES every 2 hours]

mb-api-token.description: The secret API token used for making requests to MaxBounty's API

mb-app-token.description: The token used by MaxBounty applications to save session information.

parameters.name: x-access-token
parameters.description: The 'mb-api-token' returned from the Authentication resource.

description.example: The purpose of this site is to drive traffic to my campaigns.

parameters.name: x-access-token
parameters.description: The 'mb-api-token' returned from the Authentication resource.

requestBody.description: Provide the values to be updated.

type.description: They type of postback. (L = url, I=html, S=server).

parameters.name: x-access-token
parameters.description: The 'mb-api-token' returned from the Authentication resource.

parameters.name: Campaign ID
parameters.description: The campaign ID.

description.example: This Personal Loan Campaign converts on an e-mail submit.

keywords.description: A list of keywords that match this campaign.
keywords.example: email, loan, finance, low income, personal

tracking_type.description: Tracking type. S = server, I = iFrame, L = pixel

geo_filtering.description: If this value is 'Y', only countries in the allowed_countries list are allowed to convert.

os_filtering.description: If this value is 'Y', only devices in the os_list are allowed to convert.

desktop_traffic.description: Whether or not desktop traffic is allowed.

mobile_traffic.description: Whether or not mobile traffic is allowed.

affiliate_campaign_status.description: The affiliate's status on the campaign.

landing_page_sample.description: A sample of what the landing page will look like.

daily_cap.description: Describes the default cap for the campaign.
daily_cap.example: This campaign does not have a daily cap.

expiry_date.description: The expiry date for the campaign - if any.

thumbnail.description: The thumbnail of the main landing page.

allowed_countries.description: Country codes for countries from which traffic is allowed. Only applies if geo_filtering is 'Y'

default_rate.description: Whether or not this is the default rate.

description.description: A description of how the rate converts.

conversion_type.description: The type of action that causes the conversion.

search_restriction.description: Describes any restrictions on search traffic.

suppression.description: Whether or not there is a suppression list for this campaign.

suppression_list.description: A GET request to this url with the authentication header will provide the suppression list in JSON format.

landing_pages.description: An array of the available landing pages.

thumbnail.description: The thumbnail of the main landing page.

creatives.description: An array of the available creatives.

os_list.description: Operating systems from which traffic is allowed. Only applies if os_filtering_flag is 'Y'

postback.description: The campaign level postback, if any.

code.description: The code to be run after a lead is generated.

is_bookmarked.description: Whether or not this campaign has been bookmarked.

parameters.name: x-access-token
parameters.description: The 'mb-api-token' returned from the Authentication resource.

parameters.name: Campaign ID
parameters.description: The campaign for which the postback will be updated.

requestBody.description: Provide the values to be updated.

type.description: They type of postback. (L = url, I=html, S=server).

parameters.name: x-access-token
parameters.description: The 'mb-api-token' returned from the Authentication resource.

parameters.name: Campaign ID
parameters.description: The campaign ID to be bookmarked.

parameters.name: x-access-token
parameters.description: The 'mb-api-token' returned from the Authentication resource.

parameters.name: Campaign ID
parameters.description: The campaign ID to be removed from bookmarks.

post.description: Returns the tracking link for the requested campaign.

parameters.name: x-access-token
parameters.description: The 'mb-api-token' returned from the Authentication resource.

requestBody.description: Provide the traffic and creative types user selected.

get.description: Get a list of all campaigns, sorted by most recently launched.

parameters.name: x-access-token
parameters.description: The 'mb-api-token' returned from the Authentication resource.

parameters.name: list
parameters.description: The list of campaigns desired. Options: new, popular, suggested, top, trending, recentlyViewed, recentlyApproved, bookmarked, amPicks

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number for the request.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The desired number of fetched results.

highlight.description: Whether or not this campaign is being highlighted.

get.description: Fetch the campaigns expired in last month.

parameters.name: x-access-token
parameters.description: The 'mb-api-token' returned from the Authentication resource.

get.description: Get a list of the affiliate's account balance transactions.

parameters.name: x-access-token
parameters.description: The 'mb-api-token' returned from the Authentication resource.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: The year for the report.

message.example: No data found for requested year.

available_years.description: A list of the available years.

starting_balance_by_year.description: The starting balance at the beginning of each year.

parameters.name: x-access-token
parameters.description: The 'mb-api-token' returned from the Authentication resource.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: The start date for the requested report. If not provided, it default to the start of the current month.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: The end date for the requested report. If not provided, it default to the end of the current month.

get.description: Get the creative report for a specific campaign.

parameters.name: x-access-token
parameters.description: The 'mb-api-token' returned from the Authentication resource.

parameters.name: oid
parameters.description: The ID of the campaign for the requested creative report.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: The start date for the requested report. If not provided, it default to the start of the current month.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: The end date for the requested report. If not provided, it default to the end of the current month.

get.description: Get the subid report for a specific campaign. You can omit the campaign ID to get the subid report across all campaigns.

parameters.name: x-access-token
parameters.description: The 'mb-api-token' returned from the Authentication resource.

parameters.name: oid
parameters.description: The ID of the campaign for the requested subid report. You can omit the campaign ID to get the subid report across all campaigns.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: The start date for the requested report. If not provided, it default to the start of the current month.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: The end date for the requested report. If not provided, it default to the end of the current month.

get.description: Get the landing page report for a specific campaign.

parameters.name: x-access-token
parameters.description: The 'mb-api-token' returned from the Authentication resource.

parameters.name: oid
parameters.description: The campaign ID for the landing pages report.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: The start date for the requested report. If not provided, it default to the start of the current month.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: The end date for the requested report. If not provided, it default to the end of the current month.

get.description: Get the click report for a specific campaign by landing page, creative, subid.

parameters.name: x-access-token
parameters.description: The 'mb-api-token' returned from the Authentication resource.

parameters.name: oid
parameters.description: The ID of the campaign for the requested click report.

parameters.name: lpid
parameters.description: The ID of the landing page for the requested click report.

parameters.name: cid
parameters.description: The ID of the creative for the requested click report.

parameters.name: subid
parameters.description: The Sub ID for the requested click report.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: The start date for the requested report. If not provided, it default to the start of the current month.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: The end date for the requested report. If not provided, it default to the end of the current month.

get.description: Get the conversion report for a specific campaign. The Campaign ID can be ommitted to get a list of conversions across all campaigns.

parameters.name: x-access-token
parameters.description: The 'mb-api-token' returned from the Authentication resource.

parameters.name: oid
parameters.description: The ID of the campaign for the requested conversion report. The Campaign ID can be ommitted to get a list of conversions across all campaigns.

parameters.name: cid
parameters.description: The creative id for specific response.

parameters.name: lpid
parameters.description: The landing page id for landing page specific conversions.

parameters.name: subid
parameters.description: The sub id for subid specific conversions.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number of the request. Each page will show a maximum of 50 results at a time.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: The start date for the requested report. If not provided, it default to the start of the current month.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: The end date for the requested report. If not provided, it default to the end of the current month.

parameters.name: x-access-token
parameters.description: The 'mb-api-token' returned from the Authentication resource.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number of the request. Each page will show a maximum of 50 results at a time.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: The start date for the requested report. If not provided, it default to the start of the current month.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: The end date for the requested report. If not provided, it default to the end of the current month.

parameters.name: x-access-token
parameters.description: The 'mb-api-token' returned from the Authentication resource.

parameters.description: The 'mb-api-token' returned from the Authentication resource.
